Let's think step-by-step. Step 1 — Identify deferred tax approach: - Scenario mapping: minimum liquidity covenant based on committed facilities availability + overnight sovereign curve reference for discounting short cashflows + regional market liquidity shock due to geopolitical event + low FX hedging effectiveness under 70% (basis mismatch). - Table 0 intersection (row "regional market liquidity shock due to geopolitical event" × column with "minimum liquidity covenant" + "overnight sovereign curve" + "low effectiveness under 70%") gives: "valuation allowance applied to uncertain tax position deferred assets". - Deferred tax approach = valuation allowance applied to uncertain tax position deferred assets. Step 2 — Determine credit enhancement mechanism for the specified fiscal/cash-sweep/escrow setup: - Using the deferred tax result (valuation allowance ...) look up Table 1 for "fiscal year aligned to April 30 with regulatory overlay" and the subcolumn matching "second-tier sweep after mandatory tax and operating costs" and "servicing escrow partially funded with scheduled replenishment". - Table 1 entry for "valuation allowance applied to uncertain tax position deferred assets" under April‑30 + second‑tier sweep = "servicing escrow partially funded with scheduled replenishment (true sale securitisation credit wrap with excess spread support) GHS". - Credit enhancement mechanism = true sale securitisation credit wrap with excess spread support. Step 3 — Extract pro forma adjusted enterprise values for the three capital layers under the credit enhancement and tax‑loss arrangements (use Table 2): - Preferred instrument with cumulative coupon rights + (strategic contingency stash — scheduled utilisation of tax losses across forecast horizon subject to caps) + credit enhancement = true sale securitisation credit wrap: value = 16,650,997,422.090000 GHS - Senior secured tranche (first‑loss subordinate treatment) + (strategic contingency stash — carryforward utilisation contingent on taxable profit corridors) + credit enhancement = true sale securitisation credit wrap: value = 26,291,601,771.820000 GHS - Mezzanine tranche (subordinated but coupon deferrable) + (committed liquidity line — undrawn facility categorisation with scheduled utilisation of tax losses across forecast horizon subject to caps) + credit enhancement = true sale securitisation credit wrap: value = 36,838,333,842.560000 GHS Step 4 — Compute average adjusted enterprise value (all calculations to 6 decimal places): - Sum pairwise: 16,650,997,422.090000 + 26,291,601,771.820000 = 42,942,599,193.910000 - Sum total: 42,942,599,193.910000 + 36,838,333,842.560000 = 79,780,933,036.470000 - Average = 79,780,933,036.470000 / 3 = 26,593,644,345.490000 GHS Final answer: 26593644345.490000

Step 1 — locate the prepayment assumption: - Overcollateralization coverage = 15% and hedging counterparty = Morgan Stanley swaps desk ⇒ this maps to the third subcolumn under the 15% band. - Legal/enforceability note = Irish securitization vehicle and vintage = 2024 ⇒ the cell in that row/column is "PSA 100 standard GHS". - Therefore prepayment speed assumption = PSA 100 standard GHS. Step 2 — determine the stress loss scenario for Series 2019 class B with senior-tranche priority sweep and DSR buffer level 1: - In Table 1, row "senior tranche priority sweep" and reserve "DSR buffer level 1", under the PSA 100 standard column, the entry is "COVID-19 shock 2020 analog (Series 2019 class B) GHS". - Therefore the stress loss scenario = COVID-19 shock 2020 analog. Step 3 — extract residual yield estimates for the two deals under that stress scenario and specified default curves: - WellsFargo-PrimeRMBS-2021-A (Selene Servicing), lagged default onset curve = 14.62 → 14.620000 (six-decimal precision). - GoldmanSachs-ABS-2019-R1 (LoanCare Servicing), stochastic jump default = 13.42 → 13.420000 (six-decimal precision). Step 4 — compute the average residual yield estimate (GHS) across the two deals: - Sum = 14.620000 + 13.420000 = 28.040000 (six-decimal precision). - Average = 28.040000 / 2 = 14.020000 (six-decimal precision). Final answer: 14.020000
